close_reason: Changed to rust,no_run with proper compile-checkable example
description: The only code example in this crate (lib.rs lines 20-27) is annotated rust,ignore. This means cargo test and cargo doc never compile-check it. The example already contains at least one issue: it calls signer.sign() which panics on error, with no warning. As the API evolves, the example will silently drift. Either the example should be made compilable with a mock backend, or each adapter type needs per-type doc examples that can be tested.
title: Crate-level doc example is rust,ignore and will not compile-check
